✶








✳








✢








·








U








n








✢ f

⏺ Bash(python3.13 --version)Waiting…✳ Unfurling… (36s · ↓ 160 tokens · thought for 3s)  ⎿  Tip: /goal keeps Claude working until a      condition is met. Good for "tests pass", "build     succeeds", or long refactors.────────────────────────────────────────── post-23 ──
❯  
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 esc to interrupt
3








───────────────────────────────────────────────────── Bash commandpython3.13 --versionTrigger Bash menu with python3.13 to provoke    options-collapsed detector This command requires approval
 Do you want to proceed?
 ❯ 1. Yes
 2.Yes, and don’t ask again fo: python3.13 --version

 3. No

 Esc to cancel · Tab to amend · ctrl+e to explain
  2. Yes, an  don’t ask  gain for: python .13 *3. NoEsc to cancel · Tab to amend · ctrl+e to explain
